description: CUL Add.3414 (c?). Noted and copied by Baneth. Goitein looked for this document in 1965 and could not find it; speculated that perhaps it was removed from this folder and placed under glass. Legal document. Shelomo b. Yefet al-Qudsī owes 102 dinars to Mevorakh b. Elʿazar. A delay of seven months is granted. Meanwhile Mevorakh will sell 70 garments (thawb) for Shlomo in Damietta. If he cannot provide all of the garments, he will pay 1 1/3 dinars for every garment. Signed by Yiṣḥaq b. Shemu'el, Ephraim ha-Kohen b. Eli ha-Parnas, and Yeqūtiel b. Moshe. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי; שלמה בן יפת אל-קודסי חייב 102 דינרים למבורך בן אלעזר; ניתנת דחייה של שבעה חודשים; מבורך ימכור 70 בגדים עבורו בדמיאט
